questions.question: Retail ka sabse aasaan matlab kya hai?

options.B: Samaan banana (Manufacturing)
options.C: Customer ko direct choti मात्रा mein samaan bechna

questions.explanation: Retail ka matlab hai end customer ko सीधे products ya services bechna.

questions.question: MRP ka full form kya hota hai?

options.B: Minimum Retail Price
options.C: My Retail Price

questions.explanation: MRP ka matlab Maximum Retail Price hota hai, jisse zyada daam par koi bhi product nahi becha ja sakta.

questions.question: Ek departmental store mein kya milta hai?

options.B: Sirf dawaiyan
options.C: Ek hi chhat ke neeche alag-alag departments mein kai tarah ke products

questions.explanation: Departmental store mein alag-alag departments hote hain jaise clothing, electronics, grocery, etc.

questions.question: Store kholne se pehle sabse zaroori kaam kya hai?

options.B: Safai aur lighting check karna
options.C: Lunch karna

questions.explanation: Store opening checklist mein safai, lights, aur display check karna sabse pehle aata hai taaki customers ke liye ek accha mahaul banaya ja sake.

questions.question: Retail Sales Associate ka mukhya kaam kya hai?

options.B: Customers ki madad karna aur sales badhana
options.C: Accounts manage karna

questions.explanation: Sales associate ka primary role customers ko assist karna aur product bechkar store ki sales increase karna hota hai.

questions.question: B2C ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Business to Customer
options.C: Buyer to Customer

questions.explanation: B2C ka matlab Business to Customer hota hai, jahan company seedhe end user ya customer ko samaan bechti hai.

questions.question: Store mein saaf-safai (Hygiene) maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Customers par accha impression daalne ke liye
options.C: Sirf festivals par zaroori hai

questions.explanation: Ek saaf-suthra store customers ko attract karta hai aur unhe ek positive shopping experience deta hai.

questions.question: Ek kirana store kis type ke retail ka example hai?

options.B: Unorganized Retail
options.C: E-commerce

questions.explanation: Kirana stores aam taur par Unorganized Retail sector mein aate hain kyunki ve chote, family-owned businesses hote hain.

questions.question: Store band karte samay (closing procedure) kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Lights band karke seedhe ghar chale jaana
options.B: Din bhar ki sales ka hisaab karna, cash counter lock karna aur store secure karna
options.C: Agle din ki planning karna

questions.explanation: Closing procedure mein cash tally karna, store ko theek se lock karna, aur sabhi systems ko band karna shaamil hai.

questions.question: Supply Chain Management mein 'last mile delivery' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Manufacturer se distributor tak samaan pahunchana
options.C: Distribution center se customer ke ghar tak samaan pahunchana

questions.explanation: 'Last mile delivery' supply chain ka aakhri step hota hai, jisme product ko transportation hub se final destination, yaani customer tak pahunchaya jaata hai.

questions.question: E-commerce retail kya hota hai?

options.B: TV par advertisement dekar bechna
options.C: Internet (website ya app) ke through samaan bechna

questions.explanation: E-commerce mein products aur services internet ke zariye online kharide aur beche jaate hain.

questions.question: Ek 'Big Box Retailer' kise kehte hain?

options.A: Ek choti dukaan jo bade box bechti hai
options.B: Ek bahut bada store (jaise hypermarket) jismein variety of products hote hain
options.C: Ek online store

questions.explanation: Big Box Retailer ek bahut bade physical store ko kehte hain, jaise Walmart ya IKEA, jahan badi matra mein alag-alag samaan milta hai.

questions.question: Kisi product ka SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) kya hota hai?

options.B: Product ka brand
options.C: Ek unique code jo product ko track karne ke liye use hota hai

questions.explanation: SKU ek unique alphanumeric code hota hai jo har product ko uske size, color, aur type ke hisaab se identify aur track karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Retail associate ke liye product knowledge kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Customer ke sawalon ka sahi jawab dene aur unka trust jeetne ke liye
options.C: Stock count karne ke liye
options.D: Manager ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Acchi product knowledge se associate customer ke doubts clear kar sakta hai aur sahi product suggest karke sales close kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Retail mein 'shrinkage' ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Chori, kharabi ya error ke kaaran stock ka kam ho jaana
options.C: Store ka size chota karna

questions.explanation: Shrinkage us stock loss ko kehte hain jo chori (shoplifting/employee theft), damage, ya administrative errors ke kaaran hota hai.

questions.question: Store ka layout design karte waqt sabse zaroori baat kya hai?

options.B: Customer aasani se ghoom sake aur products tak pahunch sake
options.C: Zyada se zyada samaan bhara ja sake
options.D: Staff ke liye aaram karne ki jagah ho

questions.explanation: Ek accha store layout customer ke movement ko aasan banata hai, jisse unka shopping experience behtar hota hai aur sales badhti hai.

questions.question: Omni-channel retail kya hai?

options.B: Sirf physical store se bechna
options.C: Customer ko online, mobile app, aur physical store jaise sabhi channels par ek jaisa experience dena

questions.explanation: Omni-channel retail ka matlab hai sabhi sales channels (online, offline, mobile) ko integrate karke customer ko ek seamless aur consistent shopping experience dena.

questions.question: Jab koi customer store mein enter kare, to sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unhe ignore karna jab tak woh kuch pooche nahi
options.B: Apne kaam mein lage rehna
options.C: Ek smile ke saath unhe greet karna, jaise 'Welcome Sir/Ma'am'

questions.explanation: Customer ko store mein aate hi greet karna ek accha first impression banata hai aur unhe comfortable feel karata hai.

questions.question: Ek gusse wale customer ko handle karne ka sabse accha tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Unhe ignore karna
options.C: Shaanti se unki baat sunna, unki problem samjhna aur solution offer karna
options.D: Manager ko bula kar khud chale jaana

questions.explanation: Gusse wale customer ko shaanti se sunna (active listening) aur empathy dikhana zaroori hai. Isse situation control mein aati hai aur solution nikalne mein aasani hoti hai.

questions.question: 'Active Listening' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Customer ki baat kaatna
options.C: Customer ki baat ko dhyaan se sunna, samjhna aur zaroorat padne par sawal poochna

questions.explanation: Active listening ka matlab hai puri tarah se focus karke sunna aur samjhna ki samne wala kya keh raha hai.

questions.question: Agar customer koi aisa product maang raha hai jo stock mein nahi hai, to aap kya kahenge?

options.B: 'Maaf kijiye Sir/Ma'am, yeh abhi available nahi hai, lekin main aapke liye iska alternative product dikha sakta/sakti hoon.'
options.C: 'Aapko doosri dukaan par mil jayega.'

questions.explanation: Product na hone par politely mana karna aur alternative suggest karna ek acchi customer service ka hissa hai. Isse customer khali haath nahi jaata.

questions.question: Customer se baat karte samay aapki body language kaisi honi chahiye?

options.B: Zameen ki taraf dekhna
options.C: Positive, friendly aur aankhon mein dekh kar (eye contact banakar)

questions.explanation: Positive body language jaise smile aur eye contact, confidence aur interest dikhati hai, jisse customer aapse baat karne mein comfortable feel karta hai.

questions.question: Customer feedback lena kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Apni service aur products ko behtar banane ke liye
options.C: Sirf negative comments janne ke liye

questions.explanation: Customer feedback se company ko apni kamiyan pata chalti hain aur woh apni services ko improve kar sakti hai.

questions.question: Ek 'loyal customer' kaun hota hai?

options.B: Jo sirf ek baar kharidari karta hai
options.C: Jo baar-baar aapke store se hi kharidari karta hai

questions.explanation: Loyal customer woh hota hai jo aapke brand ya store par vishwas karta hai aur lagatar aapse hi kharidari karna pasand karta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek customer aapse kisi doosre staff member ki shikayat kare to aapka pehla kadam kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Customer se kehna ki yeh aapka kaam nahi hai
options.B: Us staff member se customer ke saamne hi jhagda karna
options.C: Customer se maafi maangna aur unki poori baat shaanti se sunna

questions.explanation: Aise situation mein, sabse pehle store ki taraf se maafi maangni chahiye aur customer ko yeh mehsoos karana chahiye ki unki baat suni ja rahi hai. Iske baad mamle ko manager tak le jaana chahiye.

questions.question: Customer ko 'Sir' ya 'Ma'am' keh kar bulana kya darshata hai?

options.B: Professionalism aur respect
options.C: Yeh zaroori nahi hai

questions.explanation: Customers ko Sir/Ma'am kehna ek professional tareeka hai unhe respect dene ka, jisse ek positive mahaul banta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko customer ki baat samajh nahi aa rahi hai, to aap kya karenge?

options.A: Andaza laga kar koi bhi product de denge
options.B: Politely unse apni baat dohrane ke liye kahenge
options.C: Unhe kisi aur staff ke paas bhej denge

questions.explanation: Agar kuch samajh na aaye to galat information dene se behtar hai ki politely customer se request karke unki baat dobara suni jaaye.

questions.question: Customer service mein 'empathy' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Customer ke liye bura feel karna
options.B: Customer ki situation ko samjhna aur unke point of view se sochna
options.C: Customer ki har baat maan lena

questions.explanation: Empathy ka matlab hai khud ko customer ki jagah rakh kar unki problem ko samjhna. Isse behtar solution dene mein madad milti hai.

questions.question: Phone par customer service dete waqt sabse zaroori kya hai?

options.B: Apni awaaz saaf aur friendly rakhna
options.C: Phone hold par rakh dena

questions.explanation: Phone par aapki body language nahi dikhti, isliye aapki tone of voice bahut important ho jaati hai. Ek saaf aur friendly tone professional lagti hai.

questions.question: Agar koi customer price ko lekar complaint kar raha hai, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Kehna ki 'price to itna hi hai, lena hai to lo'
options.B: Product ki value aur features samjha kar price ko justify karna
options.C: Manager se poochhe bina discount de dena

questions.explanation: Price complaint par product ki quality, features aur benefits batakar uski value samjhana ek professional tareeka hai. Isse customer ko lag sakta hai ki price aakhir aakhir aakhir aakhir sahi hai.

questions.question: Customer ke jaane ke baad unhe 'Thank you, visit again' kehna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Isse customer ko accha feel hota hai aur woh dobara aana chahega
options.C: Isse sales badh jaati hai

questions.explanation: Yeh ek courteous gesture hai jo customer ko valued feel karata hai aur ek lasting positive impression chhodta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'undecided' customer (jo faisla nahi le pa raha) ki madad kaise karein?

options.A: Un par jaldi kharidne ka dabav daalna
options.B: Unhe akele chhod dena
options.C: Unki zaroorat samjhkar 2-3 best options dikhana aur unke pros/cons batana

questions.explanation: Undecided customer ko options dekar confuse karne ke bajaye, unki needs ke hisaab se kuch best options suggest karna unhe decision lene mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Customer Relationship Management (CRM) kya hai?

options.B: Ek software ya system jisse customer ki jaankari aur unke saath interactions ko manage kiya jaata hai
options.C: Sirf customer ko call karna

questions.explanation: CRM ek technology hai jo companies ko apne customers ke saath relationships aur interactions ko manage aur analyze karne mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Agar store mein bahut bheed hai, to aap customers ko kaise manage karenge?

options.A: Chilla kar shaant rehne ko kahenge
options.B: Kuch customers ko store ke bahar wait karne ko kahenge
options.C: Shaant rahenge, har customer ko acknowledge karenge aur batayenge ki aap jald hi unki madad karenge
options.D: Kaam chhod kar side mein ho jayenge

questions.explanation: Bheed mein patience rakhna aur har customer ko acknowledge karna zaroori hai. Isse customers ko lagta hai ki unka dhyaan rakha ja raha hai, bhale hi thoda time lage.

questions.question: Sales process ka pehla step kya hota hai?

options.B: Price batana
options.C: Customer ki zaroorat (need) ko samjhna

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi product ko bechne se pehle yeh samjhna zaroori hai ki customer ko asal mein kya chahiye.

questions.question: Product ke 'Features' aur 'Benefits' mein kya fark hai?

options.B: Feature batata hai 'product kya hai', jabki Benefit batata hai 'product customer ke liye kya karega'
options.C: Feature price hota hai aur Benefit discount
options.D: Feature company batati hai aur Benefit customer batata hai

questions.explanation: Example: Feature - 'Is phone mein 5000mAh battery hai.' Benefit - 'Aap isse ek baar charge karke do din tak chala sakte hain.'

questions.question: Up-selling ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Customer ko mehenga product bechna jo unhone socha tha usse behtar ho
options.B: Customer ko extra product bechna
options.C: Customer ko discount dena

questions.explanation: Up-selling mein customer ko uske chune hue product ka ek behtar, thoda mehenga version kharidne ke liye convince kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Cross-selling ka ek accha example kya hai?

options.A: Mobile kharidne wale ko 128GB version bechna 64GB ke bajaye
options.B: Mobile kharidne wale ko uske saath cover aur screen guard bechna
options.C: Mobile par discount dena
options.D: Mobile ke saath free gift dena

questions.explanation: Cross-selling mein main product se related doosre products beche jaate hain, jaise phone ke saath cover, ya shoes ke saath socks.

questions.question: 'Closing a sale' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Customer se baat karna
options.C: Customer ko kharidari ke final decision tak pahunchana aur payment lena

questions.explanation: Closing woh final step hai jahan customer product kharidne ke liye taiyaar ho jaata hai aur transaction poora hota hai.

questions.question: Customer kehta hai, 'Yeh bahut mehenga hai'. Is objection ko handle karne ka sabse accha tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Uski baat na sunna
options.C: Product ki value, quality aur long-term fayde samjhana

questions.explanation: Price objection ko handle karne ke liye product ki value par focus karna chahiye. Batayein ki acchi quality ke liye thoda zyada kharch karna kaise faydemand hai.

questions.question: Open-ended questions kya hote hain?

options.A: Woh sawal jinka jawab 'Haan' ya 'Naa' mein hota hai
options.B: Woh sawal jo customer ko detail mein jawab dene ke liye encourage karte hain
options.C: Woh sawal jo product ke baare mein hote hain
options.D: Woh sawal jo manager poochta hai

questions.explanation: Jaise 'Aap is phone mein kya features dhoondh rahe hain?' yeh ek open-ended question hai. Isse customer ki zaroorat ka pata chalta hai.

questions.question: Sales target achieve karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Yeh store ki growth aur profitability ke liye zaroori hai
options.C: Yeh zaroori nahi hai
options.D: Manager ko khush karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sales targets store ke financial goals ko poora karne mein madad karte hain, jisse business chalta rehta hai aur grow karta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek customer kehta hai, 'Main soch kar bataunga', to aapka kya response hona chahiye?

options.B: Unpar turant kharidne ka dabav daalna
options.C: Unse politely poochna ki kya unke mann mein koi doubt hai jise aap clear kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Yeh kehna unke hesitation ka kaaran janne ka ek mauka deta hai. Ho sakta hai unhe price, feature ya kisi aur cheez par doubt ho jise aap solve kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Product demonstration (demo) dene ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Customer ko product use karna samajh aata hai aur uske features live dikhte hain
options.C: Product kharab ho sakta hai
options.D: Yeh sirf mehenge products ke liye hota hai

questions.explanation: Demo se customer ka product par vishwas badhta hai aur woh uske benefits ko behtar tareeke se samajh paata hai.

questions.question: Ek accha salesman banne ke liye sabse zaroori quality kya hai?

options.B: Accha sunne wala (Good Listener) hona
options.C: Sirf product bechna

questions.explanation: Ek accha salesman pehle sunta hai aur customer ki zaroorat samjhta hai, fir uske hisaab se solution deta hai.

questions.question: Impulse buying kya hoti hai?

options.B: Bina plan kiye achanak kuch kharid lena
options.C: Online shopping karna

questions.explanation: Impulse buying woh kharidari hoti hai jo customer ne pehle se plan nahi ki hoti, lekin store mein product dekh kar achanak kharid leta hai. Checkout counter par rakhe chocolates iska accha example hain.

questions.question: Sales mein 'lead' ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Ek potential customer jisne aapke product mein interest dikhaya hai
options.C: Sabse zyada bikne wala product

questions.explanation: Lead ek vyakti ya company hoti hai jo aapka customer ban sakta hai. Unhone kisi form, call ya visit ke through interest show kiya hota hai.

questions.question: Negotiation (mol-bhav) ke samay kya dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Customer ki har baat maan leni chahiye
options.B: Bilkul bhi price kam nahi karna chahiye
options.C: Ek win-win situation banane ki koshish karni chahiye jahan customer aur store dono ko fayda ho

questions.explanation: Acchi negotiation mein dono parties khush rehti hain. Thoda discount dekar ya koi chota freebie offer karke customer ko khush kiya ja sakta hai bina company ko नुकसान pahunchaye.

questions.question: FAB technique (Features, Advantages, Benefits) mein 'Advantage' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Product ka feature
options.C: Yeh batana ki feature kaise customer ke liye faydemand hai

questions.explanation: Advantage, feature aur benefit ke beech ka bridge hai. Yeh explain karta hai ki koi specific feature (e.g., waterproof) kaise customer ki madad karega (e.g., aap baarish mein bhi use kar sakte hain).

questions.question: Follow-up karna kab zaroori hota hai?

options.A: Jab customer ne choti cheez kharidi ho
options.B: Kabhi zaroori nahi hota
options.C: Jab customer ne badi cheez kharidi ho ya koi decision pending chhod kar gaya ho

questions.explanation: Bade ticket items (jaise car, AC) ke baad ya jab customer ne sochne ka time maanga ho, tab ek polite follow-up call ya message sale close karne mein madad kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapka competitor aapse kam daam par wahi product bech raha hai, to aap customer ko kaise convince karenge?

options.B: Apni behtar customer service, warranty, aur store ke trust par focus karke
options.C: Customer se jhoot bolkar ki product alag hai
options.D: Apne manager se us customer ke liye daam kam karwa kar

questions.explanation: Sirf price par compete karne ke bajaye, apni unique selling points (USPs) jaise behtar service, original product guarantee, aur after-sales support par zor dena chahiye.

questions.question: Inventory Management ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Store mein rakhe stock ka sahi hisaab-kitaab rakhna
options.C: Samaan bechna

questions.explanation: Inventory management mein stock ko order karna, store karna, aur track karna shaamil hai taaki sahi samay par sahi product available ho.

questions.question: Visual Merchandising (VM) ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Products ko is tarah display karna ki customer attract ho aur zyada kharide
options.C: Stock ko ginna

questions.explanation: VM ka goal product display ko aakarshak banakar customer ka attention khichna aur sales ko badhana hai.

questions.question: FIFO method ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: First-In, First-Out
options.C: First-In, Final-Out

questions.explanation: FIFO (First-In, First-Out) ka matlab hai jo stock pehle aaya hai, use pehle bechna chahiye. Yeh khaas kar perishable goods (jaise milk, bread) ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Store ke window display ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Store ko hawa daar banana
options.C: Bahar se guzarne wale logon ko store ke andar aane ke liye attract karna

questions.explanation: Window display pehla impression hota hai. Ek accha display potential customers ko store mein aane ke liye majboor kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Stock-taking ya Physical Count kya hota hai?

options.B: Store mein maujood saare stock ko manually ginna
options.C: Stock ko bechna

questions.explanation: Stock-taking mein manually har item ko gina jaata hai taaki system mein dikh rahe stock aur actual stock ko match kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Planogram kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek diagram jo batata hai ki kaun sa product shelf par kahan rakha jayega
options.C: Discount ka plan

questions.explanation: Planogram ek visual diagram hota hai jo retail stores ko yeh decide karne mein madad karta hai ki products ko shelves par kaise place karna hai taaki sales maximize ho.

questions.question: Shelf par products ko aage ki taraf karke rakhne (facing) ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Blocking ya Facing
options.C: Displaying

questions.explanation: Is process ko 'Blocking' ya 'Facing' kehte hain. Isse shelves bhari hui aur saaf-suthri dikhti hain, jo customers ko attract karti hain.

questions.question: Dead stock kise kehte hain?

options.A: Woh stock jo bahut tezi se bik raha hai
options.B: Woh stock jo lambe samay se nahi bik raha hai
options.C: Kharab ho chuka stock

questions.explanation: Dead stock woh inventory hai jo store mein lambe samay se padi hai aur bik nahi rahi, jisse paisa block ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Eye-level par kaun se products rakhe jaane chahiye?

options.B: Sabse zyada bikne wale ya high-margin wale products
options.C: Sabse bhaari products

questions.explanation: 'Eye level is buy level.' Jin products ko store sabse zyada bechna chahta hai, unhe customer ki aankhon ke level par rakha jaata hai taaki un par sabse pehle nazar pade.

questions.question: Mannequin (putla) ka istemaal kis liye hota hai?

options.B: Kapde aur accessories ko customer par kaise dikhenge, yeh dikhane ke liye
options.C: Bhaari samaan uthane ke liye

questions.explanation: Mannequins par kapde pehnakar display kiye jaate hain taaki customers ko unka look aur fit ka andaza lag sake.

questions.question: Store mein aane-jaane ka raasta (aisle) saaf aur khula kyun hona chahiye?

options.A: Taaki staff aasani se daud sake
options.B: Taaki customer aasani se ghoom sake aur safety bani rahe
options.C: Yeh zaroori nahi hai

questions.explanation: Clear aisles customer ke liye shopping ko aasan aur surakshit banate hain. Isse accident ka khatra bhi kam hota hai.

questions.question: Barcode scanner ka inventory management mein kya kaam hai?

options.B: Product ki information ko jaldi se system mein enter karna
options.C: Product ki photo lena

questions.explanation: Barcode scanner se product ko scan karke uski jaankari (jaise stock count, price) ko tezi se aur bina galti ke computer system mein daala ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek promotional display (jaise 'Buy One Get One Free' ka banner) kahan lagana sabse aasan hoga?

options.B: Store ke entrance par ya high-traffic area mein
options.C: Stock room mein

questions.explanation: Promotional displays ko aisi jagah lagana chahiye jahan se zyada se zyada customers guzarte hon, taaki offer par sabki nazar pade.

questions.question: LIFO method (Last-In, First-Out) kin products ke liye aamtaur par istemaal hota hai?

options.B: Electronics
options.C: Ret, Eent, jaise non-perishable samaan

questions.explanation: LIFO method wahan istemaal hota hai jahan products ki expiry date nahi hoti. Jaise, hardware store mein jo samaan aakhri mein aaya, woh upar rakha jaata hai aur pehle bik jaata hai.

questions.question: Store mein lighting ka visual merchandising par kya asar padta hai?

options.B: Acchi lighting products ko highlight karti hai aur store ka mood accha banati hai
options.C: Lighting se bijli ka bill badhta hai

questions.explanation: Sahi lighting products ko zyada aakarshak bana sakti hai, customers ka dhyaan kheench sakti hai aur unhe store mein zyada time bitane ke liye encourage kar sakti hai.

questions.question: Ek 'End Cap' display kya hota hai?

options.A: Store ke end mein laga display
options.B: Aisle (galiyare) ke aakhir mein laga display
options.C: Cash counter par rakha display

questions.explanation: End Cap aisle ke end mein ek prominent display hota hai. Yeh high-traffic spot hota hai, isliye yahan promotional ya best-selling products rakhe jaate hain.

questions.question: Agar aapko shelf par koi toota ya kharab product milta hai to aap kya karenge?

options.B: Use chupa denge
options.C: Use shelf se hata kar, procedure ke mutabik damage/waste area mein record karenge
options.D: Customer ko discount par bech denge

questions.explanation: Damaged product ko turant shelf se hatana chahiye taaki koi customer use na kharid le. Ise sahi procedure se record karna inventory ko aaccurate rakhne ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: POS ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Point of Service
options.C: Point of Sale

questions.explanation: POS ka matlab Point of Sale hota hai. Yeh woh jagah (cash counter) aur system (computer/machine) hai jahan customer payment karta hai.

questions.question: Cash handle karte samay sabse zaroori cheez kya hai?

options.B: Customer se baat karna
options.C: Sahi se ginna aur customer ke saamne dobara check karna

questions.explanation: Cash handling mein accuracy sabse zaroori hai. Customer ke saamne paise ginne se galatfehmi ki gunjaish nahi rehti.

questions.question: Credit card se payment lete waqt kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Card ka number note karna
options.C: Machine mein amount daal kar customer ko PIN enter karne ke liye dena
options.D: Bina signature ya PIN ke transaction kar dena

questions.explanation: Security ke liye, cashier ko amount enter karke machine customer ko deni chahiye taaki woh khud apna PIN daal sake.

questions.question: Agar POS machine kaam nahi kar rahi hai to aapka pehla kadam kya hoga?

options.B: Machine ko zor se hilana
options.C: Apne manager ya IT support ko turant inform karna

questions.explanation: Problem hone par turant senior ya technical support ko batana chahiye taaki use jaldi se theek kiya ja sake aur kaam na ruke.

questions.question: Store ki 'Return Policy' kya hoti hai?

options.A: Customer ko hamesha paise wapas karna
options.B: Woh niyam jinke tehat customer kharida hua samaan wapas ya exchange kar sakta hai
options.C: Customer ko mana karna
options.D: Sirf toota hua samaan wapas lena

questions.explanation: Return policy mein yeh saaf likha hota hai ki kitne din mein, kin conditions par, aur bill ke saath product return ya exchange ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek customer bina bill ke samaan wapas karne aaya hai. Aap kya karenge?

options.B: Politely unhe batayenge ki return policy ke hisaab se bill zaroori hai aur manager se baat karne ko kahenge
options.C: Unse jhagda karenge
options.D: Samaan rakh lenge aur paise nahi denge

questions.explanation: Har store ki policy alag hoti hai, lekin aam taur par bill zaroori hota hai. Aise mein, policy batana aur senior ki madad lena sahi kadam hai.

questions.question: UPI (jaise Google Pay, PhonePe) se payment lete waqt kya confirm karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Customer ka bank balance
options.C: Apne system mein payment received ka confirmation message

questions.explanation: Sirf customer ke phone par 'payment successful' dekhna kaafi nahi hai. Apne POS system ya phone par payment milne ka confirmation zaroor check karein.

questions.question: Cash drawer (galla) ko hamesha band kyun rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Kyunki woh khula accha nahi lagta
options.B: Chori aur galti se bachne ke liye
options.C: Usmein dhool chali jaati hai

questions.explanation: Cash drawer ko har transaction ke baad band karna ek zaroori security practice hai.

questions.question: Billing ke dauran agar galti se galat amount enter ho jaaye to kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Customer se utne hi paise le lene chahiye
options.B: Transaction ko void (cancel) karke dobara sahi amount ke saath karna chahiye
options.C: Manager ke aane ka intezaar karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Galti hone par use chupane ke bajaye, sahi procedure follow karke use theek karna chahiye. Aam taur par transaction ko void karke naya bill banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Customer ko bill (receipt) dena kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Yeh kharidari ka proof hota hai aur return/warranty ke liye kaam aata hai
options.C: Sirf maangne par dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Receipt ek legal proof of purchase hai. Yeh customer aur retailer dono ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Ek 'chargeback' kya hota hai?

options.B: Jab customer apne bank se keh kar credit card transaction ko reverse karwa deta hai
options.C: Phone ki battery charge karna

questions.explanation: Chargeback tab hota hai jab customer apne bank mein transaction ko dispute karta hai (jaise fraud ya product na milne par) aur bank retailer ke account se paise wapas le leta hai.

questions.question: Din ke end mein 'cash tally' karne ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: System mein dikh rahi cash sales ko cash drawer mein maujood actual cash se milana
options.C: Cash ko bank mein jama karna

questions.explanation: Cash tallying yeh ensure karta hai ki din bhar mein cash ka koi ghaban ya galti nahi hui hai.

questions.question: Agar koi customer aapko phata hua note de, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Note ko tape se chipka dena chahiye
options.C: Politely customer se doosra note maangna chahiye

questions.explanation: Retailers ko phate ya kharab note lene se bachna chahiye. Customer se politely doosra note maangna sabse sahi tareeka hai.

questions.question: Gift card ya voucher se payment kaise process ki jaati hai?

options.A: Use cash ki tarah treat kiya jaata hai
options.B: POS system mein gift card ka option select karke uska number ya barcode enter kiya jaata hai
options.C: Yeh India mein valid nahi hai
options.D: Manager se approval lena padta hai

questions.explanation: Zyadatar POS systems mein gift card/voucher ke liye alag se payment option hota hai jise use karke transaction poora kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi customer ka card decline ho jaaye to aap kya kahenge?

options.B: Zor se sabke saamne announce karenge
options.C: Dheere se aur privately kahenge, 'Sir/Ma'am, lagta hai card mein koi issue hai, kya aap doosra card ya koi aur payment method try karenge?'

questions.explanation: Yeh ek sensitive situation hai. Customer ko embarrass kiye bina, privately aur politely unhe doosra payment option use karne ke liye kehna chahiye.

questions.question: Nakli note (counterfeit currency) ko pehchanne ka ek tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Note ke paper ki quality aur security thread (suraksha dhaaga) ko check karna
options.C: Note par Gandhi ji ki photo dekhna

questions.explanation: Asli note ka paper khas hota hai aur usmein ek security thread hota hai. Watermark aur paper quality bhi nakli note ko pehchanne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Store mein Fire Extinguisher ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Choti aag bujhane ke liye
options.C: Safai karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Fire extinguisher ek safety device hai jise emergency mein choti aag ko shuruat mein hi kabu karne ke liye istemaal kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar store mein farsh par paani ya tel gira ho to kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Uske sookhne ka intezaar karna
options.C: Turant use saaf karna ya 'Caution: Wet Floor' ka sign lagana

questions.explanation: Gile farsh se koi bhi fisal kar gir sakta hai. Isliye use turant saaf karna ya warning sign lagana zaroori hai taaki accident na ho.

questions.question: Shoplifting (dukaan mein chori) ko rokne ka ek tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Alert rehna aur har customer ko acchi service dena
options.C: Dukaan mein kam roshni rakhna
options.D: Customers ko store mein aane se rokna

questions.explanation: Jab staff alert rehta hai aur har customer ko greet karke unki madad ke liye poochta hai, to chori karne walon ko mauka nahi milta.

questions.question: Ek retail professional ke liye acchi grooming (saaf-suthre kapde, baal, etc.) kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Isse ek professional aur positive image banti hai
options.C: Sirf interview ke din zaroori hai

questions.explanation: Acchi grooming se aap professional dikhte hain aur customer par accha prabhav padta hai. Yeh company ki image ko bhi represent karta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko store mein koi laawaris bag dikhe to aapka pehla kadam kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Use utha kar counter par rakh dena
options.C: Use haath nahi lagana aur turant apne manager ya security ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Anjaan aur laawaris cheezon ko chhoona khatarnak ho sakta hai. Security protocol ke hisaab se, iski jaankari turant security ya manager ko deni chahiye.

questions.question: Teamwork ka retail store mein kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Teamwork zaroori nahi, individual performance matter karti hai
options.B: Isse kaam jaldi aur behtar tareeke se hota hai, aur store ka mahaul accha rehta hai
options.C: Isse sirf gossip hoti hai
options.D: Isse kaam dheema ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Acchi teamwork se store ke operations smooth chalte hain, customer service behtar hoti hai aur sabhi employees ka morale high rehta hai.

questions.question: Apne co-worker ke saath jhagda hone par aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Manager se uski shikayat karna
options.C: Akele mein ya manager ki madad se shaanti se masle ko suljhana
options.D: Usse baat karna band kar dena

questions.explanation: Professional workplace mein jhagde ko customer se door, aapas mein ya supervisor ki madad se suljhana chahiye.

questions.question: Store ki confidential information (jaise sales data) ke saath kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Apne doston ke saath share karna chahiye
options.B: Social media par post karna chahiye
options.C: Ise gupt rakhna chahiye aur kisi anjaan se share nahi karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Sales data jaisi jaankari company ki confidential property hoti hai. Ise share karna company policy ke khilaaf hai aur isse nuksaan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Punctuality (samay par aana) ek employee ke liye kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Isse discipline aur professionalism dikhta hai
options.B: Yeh bilkul zaroori nahi hai
options.C: Sirf pehle din zaroori hai
options.D: Taaki aap doosron se pehle jaa sakein

questions.explanation: Samay par aana aapki zimmedari aur kaam ke prati dedication ko darshata hai.

questions.question: Agar aap dekhein ki koi co-worker chori kar raha hai, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usse chori mein hissa maangna chahiye
options.C: Chupke se aur turant apne manager ya HR ko iski soochana deni chahiye
options.D: Poore staff ke saamne us par ilzaam lagana chahiye

questions.explanation: Employee theft ek serious issue hai. Iski jaankari secretly aur sahi authority (manager/HR) ko dena aapki zimmedari hai. Isse company ko nuksaan se bachaya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Kaam ke dauraan personal phone calls karne ke baare mein kya policy honi chahiye?

options.A: Aap jitna chahein utni baat kar sakte hain
options.B: Sirf break time mein ya emergency hone par hi personal calls karni chahiye
options.C: Customer ke saamne bhi phone par baat kar sakte hain
options.D: Phone ko ghar par rakh kar aana chahiye

questions.explanation: Kaam ke samay phone ka personal istemaal karna unprofessional hai aur customer service par bura asar daalta hai. Ise sirf break mein ya emergency mein use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek accha team player kaun hota hai?

options.A: Jo sirf apna kaam karta hai
options.B: Jo doosron ki madad karta hai aur store ke common goals ke liye kaam karta hai
options.C: Jo hamesha manager ki haan mein haan milata hai
options.D: Jo sabse zyada chutti leta hai

questions.explanation: Ek accha team player na sirf apni zimmedari poori karta hai, balki zaroorat padne par apne co-workers ki bhi help karta hai.

questions.question: Agar customer aapse aapki personal information (jaise phone number) maange to aap kya karenge?

options.B: Politely mana kar denge aur kahenge ki yeh company policy ke khilaaf hai
options.C: Galat number de denge

questions.explanation: Apni personal information customers ke saath share karna unprofessional aur unsafe hai. Company policy ka hawala dekar politely mana karna sabse sahi tareeka hai.

questions.question: Workplace harassment (kaam ki jagah par pareshaan karna) kya hai?

options.B: Kisi ke rang, jaati, ya gender par comment karna ya use pareshaan karna
options.C: Salary ke baare mein poochna

questions.explanation: Workplace harassment ek gambhir apradh hai jismein kisi bhi tarah ka bhedbhav ya anuchit vyavhaar shaamil hai. Aisa hone par HR ya management ko report karna chahiye.

questions.question: Store mein emergency exit (aapatkaleen nikaas) ko hamesha khali kyun rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Taaki aag ya kisi aur emergency ke waqt log surakshit bahar nikal sakein
options.C: Wahan samaan rakhne ki jagah hoti hai

questions.explanation: Emergency exit ko block karna ek bada safety risk hai. Aapat स्थिति mein yeh jaan bachane ke kaam aata hai.

questions.question: Constructive criticism (s গঠনমূলক aalochana) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Aapke kaam mein sudhaar laane ke liye diya gaya helpful feedback
options.C: Sirf galtiyan nikalna

questions.explanation: Jab aapka manager ya co-worker aapke kaam ko behtar banane ke liye koi salah deta hai, to use constructive criticism kehte hain. Ise positively lena chahiye.
